response.overview: Following Salisbury’s beloved No.1 football coach, Connor Sanderson, this heartwarming and inspirational documentary celebrates his unwavering passion for the game and the strength of the community that stands behind him. Born with a disability that could have limited his dreams, Connor turned it into his greatest strength, proving that true greatness is measured by heart, purpose, and the ability to inspire others. In Salisbury and beyond, Connor Sanderson has become more than a coach; he has become larger than life!
response.title: Larger than Life
